name: T.J. Miller
bio: T.J. Miller is an American stand-up comedian and actor who came up through the Chicago improv scene and toured with The Second City. He is best known for playing Erlich Bachman on HBO's Silicon Valley and Weasel in the Deadpool films, alongside stand-up specials for Comedy Central and HBO. His career has been marked by legal incidents, including a 2018 arrest over a false bomb threat report whose charges were later dismissed.

timeline.ev: Named one of Variety's 10 Comics to Watch
Releases Comedy Central special No Real Reason
Begins playing Erlich Bachman on Silicon Valley
Releases HBO special Meticulously Ridiculous and exits Silicon Valley
Arrested over a false bomb threat report; charges later dismissed

accolades: Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Supporting Actor in a Comedy Series, 2015
Voiced Tuffnut in the How to Train Your Dragon films

bits.yt_title: T.J. Miller Stand-Up 12/13/10 | CONAN on TBS
